verificationLabel: Magic Round team lists checked Thursday 14 May 2026
summary: Magic Round starts tomorrow with the board reset around the official Round 11 team lists, a cautious charity stance, and a tip card built more around clean reads than hero shots.

scoreboard.note: Cronulla regain serious strike, while Canterbury are healthier too, so this looks like a better football game than last week's Dogs form line suggests.
Latrell back lifts South Sydney's attacking ceiling immediately, but the Dolphins are coming in with enough recent confidence to keep this volatile.
Manly still miss Turbo, but Jamal Fogarty back in the system makes them steadier than the Tigers in a Magic Round environment.
Tom Dearden's ankle injury, Liam Sutton's NRL debut at five-eighth, and Jason Taumalolo being rested shift this game back toward the Roosters despite their own missing pieces.
Melbourne finally steadied and keep enough class to stay in front of Parramatta, but trust is still limited.
The Knights keep their strong spine together and look one of the cleaner reads of the whole weekend.
Reynolds is back for Brisbane, but the Warriors also get key middle and spine reinforcements, so the safer lean still feels New Zealand.
Penrith remain the most bankable side on the card until a stronger opponent actually knocks them over.

liveAlerts.text: Magic Round is set up as a process week: trust the cleaner reads and avoid forcing chaos picks.
The Mark Hughes Foundation ledger stays at 2-2 and -$3.50, so there is no need to rush into a Round 11 bet without a real price edge.
Knights, Panthers and the healthier Sharks profile as the cleaner football reads on the board.
Rabbitohs versus Dolphins and Warriors versus Broncos both carry enough moving parts to punish overconfidence.
Roosters versus Cowboys stopped being a clean Cowboys lean once Dearden was ruled out and Sutton was pushed into a debut start.
Storm are still in the prove-it bucket even after finally stopping the slide.
No Round 11 charity bet is locked yet, which is disciplined rather than timid.
